creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text: Thanks for the feedback Li-Wen, that could be one way of doing it indeed. Although, then it becomes a bit more tricky to do the post-install-example/doc targets as the files used in there will be deleted before using the copytree-share in do-install. I just did a poudriere testport on 11.3 and 12.1 and the current patch is fine. Unless it is recommended to go for "less" lines in the makefile, testport and portlint is clean.
